(08/09/2025) - Technician Note
Hinges that join the 3rd panel to the top panel had all broken.
Temporarily fixed the door so it can be used manually
Showed tenant how to operate door & lock manually.
Saw some other cracks through panels & signs of wear on door.
Door will need to be replaced.
Motor is also not it good condition and will need to be replaced as well.
Existing door colour no longer available new colour will need to be selected.

Roller Door Inspection & Make Safe – Trent Ballin – 27/05/2026
Attended site and carried out full inspection of roller door motor and operation
Found motor to be faulty — unable to retain remote coding, with programmed remotes being deleted intermittently
Internal drive gears found to be intermittently failing, preventing consistent motor operation
Inspected Centurion door — door found to be repeatedly coning; adjusted and attended to as far as practicable however issue is ongoing due to condition of door
Engaged locking bars as temporary security measure pending replacement works
Door and motor are beyond serviceable condition — replacement of both recommended
Quote to be provided for supply and installation of new motor and door
